meta.title: The truth about tech layoffs and AI..
meta.description:
Everyone assumes AI is suddenly automating entire companies, but the reality on the ground is different. The truth about recent tech layoffs isn't that robots are running the show—it's that companies are replacing traditional workers with people who know how to use AI tools to become 10x more productive. As team sizes shrink and the bottlenecks shift, your biggest career advantage is learning the tools.

At AI Dev, we bring together people building, learning, and contributing to real AI systems, regardless of background.

We’ll continue these conversations at AI Dev 26 × San Francisco, April 28–29.

Tickets available: https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/
